live_path.role: CLI parses --owner and forwards it into the live service call
Orchestrates resolution, record creation, routing-key derivation, and payload emission
Derives effective owner and owner_source from explicit CLI input or defaults
Persists the base record with resolved owner only
Computes routing_key from resolved owner and name after owner resolution
Builds final emitted payload by adding owner_source and routing_key onto the record
Emission payload assembly point before JSON encoding

owner_source.rule: Returns "explicit" when owner is present and non-blank after strip(); otherwise returns "default" alongside the configured default owner.

routing_key.rule: Uses slugified owner and slugified name joined with ':' after the effective owner has already been resolved.

emission.rule: Copies the stored record, appends owner_source and routing_key, then returns JSON text from the CLI.

test_observations.observation: Explicit owner path emits owner=pm-oncall, owner_source=explicit, routing_key=pm-oncall:launch-checklist.
Missing --owner falls back to config/defaults.json owner and emits owner_source=default with a routing_key derived from that default owner.
CLI-to-service handoff preserves the explicit --owner path into the final emitted payload.
Docs are expected to mention --owner, owner_source, routing_key, sync_item, and the configured default owner.

rejected_decoys.reason: Legacy helper; rg shows no live callers outside its own definition block, and sync_app/service.py::sync_item imports and calls make_record instead.
Legacy helper; the live import in sync_app/service.py uses sync_app/serializer.py::build_routing_key, not this function.
Dead-end helper; rg shows no live callers, and emitted owner_source is passed directly into serialize_payload from sync_app/service.py::_resolve_owner.
Repo note is contradicted by the live code path and by tests/test_sync.py covering explicit-owner and default-owner behavior.
Unmerged draft speculation; it points to the store helper as source of truth, but the live path resolves and emits these fields in service/serializer code.
